name: Lance-Missile Portatif
description: Fantassin anti-véhicule armé d'un lanceur cinétique guidé. Chaque projectile est une frappe chirurgicale orbitale miniature.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Soldier bracing with oversized rectangular missile launcher on shoulder, angular warhead visible in tube, kneeling firing position.
